'''ae''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:head|head]]".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ?-?-?
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:head|head]]
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:?æ?i?ith|?æ?i?ith]] || [[word:?æ?i?ij|?æ?i?ij]] || [[word:?æ?i?ish|?æ?i?ish]] || [[word:?æ?i?i|?æ?i?i]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:?a?u?u?uth|?a?u?u?uth]] || [[word:?a?u?u?uj|?a?u?u?uj]] || [[word:?a?u?u?ush|?a?u?u?ush]] || [[word:?a?u?u?u|?a?u?u?u]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:?a?u?uth|?a?u?uth]] || [[word:?a?u?uj|?a?u?uj]] || [[word:?a?u?ush|?a?u?ush]] || [[word:?a?u?u|?a?u?u]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:?a?uf?ufth|?a?uf?ufth]] || [[word:?a?uf?ufj|?a?uf?ufj]] || [[word:?a?uf?ufsh|?a?uf?ufsh]] || [[word:?a?uf?uf|?a?uf?uf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:?æ?e?eth|?æ?e?eth]] || [[word:?æ?e?ej|?æ?e?ej]] || [[word:?æ?e?esh|?æ?e?esh]] || [[word:?æ?e?e|?æ?e?e]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:?a?o?o?oth|?a?o?o?oth]] || [[word:?a?o?o?oj|?a?o?o?oj]] || [[word:?a?o?o?osh|?a?o?o?osh]] || [[word:?a?o?o?o|?a?o?o?o]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:?a?o?oth|?a?o?oth]] || [[word:?a?o?oj|?a?o?oj]] || [[word:?a?o?osh|?a?o?osh]] || [[word:?a?o?o|?a?o?o]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:?a?of?ofth|?a?of?ofth]] || [[word:?a?of?ofj|?a?of?ofj]] || [[word:?a?of?ofsh|?a?of?ofsh]] || [[word:?a?of?of|?a?of?of]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[paucal]] || [[word:?a?ïf?ïfth|?a?ïf?ïfth]] || [[word:?a?ïf?ïfj|?a?ïf?ïfj]] || [[word:?a?ïf?ïfsh|?a?ïf?ïfsh]] || [[word:?a?ïf?ïf|?a?ïf?ïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plentiful]] || [[word:?a?ïf?ïf?ïfth|?a?ïf?ïf?ïfth]] || [[word:?a?ïf?ïf?ïfj|?a?ïf?ïf?ïfj]] || [[word:?a?ïf?ïf?ïfsh|?a?ïf?ïf?ïfsh]] || [[word:?a?ïf?ïf?ïf|?a?ïf?ïf?ïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:?æ?æ?æth|?æ?æ?æth]] || [[word:?æ?æ?æj|?æ?æ?æj]] || [[word:?æ?æ?æsh|?æ?æ?æsh]] || [[word:?æ?æ?æ|?æ?æ?æ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:?a?a?a?ath|?a?a?a?ath]] || [[word:?a?a?a?aj|?a?a?a?aj]] || [[word:?a?a?a?ash|?a?a?a?ash]] || [[word:?a?a?a?a|?a?a?a?a]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:?a?a?ath|?a?a?ath]] || [[word:?a?a?aj|?a?a?aj]] || [[word:?a?a?ash|?a?a?ash]] || [[word:?a?a?a|?a?a?a]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:?a?af?afth|?a?af?afth]] || [[word:?a?af?afj|?a?af?afj]] || [[word:?a?af?afsh|?a?af?afsh]] || [[word:?a?af?af|?a?af?af]]
|}

''56 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:?a?a?atha|?a?a?atha]] || [[word:?a?a?aja|?a?a?aja]] || [[word:?a?a?asha|?a?a?asha]] || [[word:?a?a?aka|?a?a?aka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:?a?a?ath|?a?a?ath]] || [[word:?a?a?aj|?a?a?aj]] || [[word:?a?a?ash|?a?a?ash]] || [[word:?a?a?a|?a?a?a]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:?a?a?athal|?a?a?athal]] || [[word:?a?a?ajal|?a?a?ajal]] || [[word:?a?a?ashal|?a?a?ashal]] || [[word:?a?a?akal|?a?a?akal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:?a?a?aathatha|?a?a?aathatha]] || [[word:?a?a?aajaja|?a?a?aajaja]] || [[word:?a?a?aashasha|?a?a?aashasha]] || [[word:?a?a?aaka|?a?a?aaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:?a?a?athan|?a?a?athan]] || [[word:?a?a?ajan|?a?a?ajan]] || [[word:?a?a?ashan|?a?a?ashan]] || [[word:?a?a?akan|?a?a?akan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:?a?a?athaoro|?a?a?athaoro]] || [[word:?a?a?ajaoro|?a?a?ajaoro]] || [[word:?a?a?ashaoro|?a?a?ashaoro]] || [[word:?a?a?akaoro|?a?a?akaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Words a3ddb2a]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
[[Category:Words 5bad82d]]
[[Category:Irregular words]]
[[Category:Words 66806d6]]
[[Category:words 8d63c8d]]
{{wordpage|9b4e2c8}}
